name: Genesis Theme Layout Library
description: Complete catalog of production-ready page layouts included in the Genesis Semantic Design System.

item.name: Post Layout
item.description: Blog posts with publication date, author, reading time, tag display, social sharing, and previous/next navigation. Uses focused environment for optimal line lengths.

item.name: Article Layout
item.description: Long-form articles with auto-generated table of contents, reading time estimates, related content, and a constrained reading column for sustained comprehension.

item.name: Archive Layout
item.description: Filterable, sortable content lists with category tabs, date-range filters, grid/list view toggle, and paginated navigation.

item.name: Profile Layout
item.description: User or contributor profiles with avatar, bio, social links, skill tags, and activity statistics.

item.name: Landing Layout
item.description: Marketing pages with hero sections, feature pillars, social proof, and call-to-action blocks. Supports sacred and vibrant atmosphere variants.

item.name: Gallery Layout
item.description: Filterable image galleries with category tabs, lightbox preview, and responsive masonry-style grid powered by distributed environment.

item.name: Form Layout
item.description: Contact and data-entry forms with field validation, progress indicators, privacy controls, and accessible label associations.

item.name: Docs Layout
item.description: Documentation pages with sidebar navigation, breadcrumbs, search, on-this-page anchors, and previous/next pagination.

item.name: FAQ Layout
item.description: Frequently asked questions with searchable accordion interface, category filtering, and contact call-to-action.

item.name: Dashboard Layout
item.description: Analytics dashboards with KPI widgets, chart areas, data tables, and sidebar panels. Uses manifest environment for dense 12-column grids.

item.name: Chatroom Layout
item.description: Real-time chat interface with message threading, participant avatars, MCP domain integration, typing indicators, and domain-switching controls.

item.name: Search Layout
item.description: Search results with highlighted matches, faceted filters, result metadata, and paginated navigation.

item.name: Settings Layout
item.description: User preferences with tabbed interface covering profile, security, notifications, privacy, and appearance settings.

item.name: Splash Layout
item.description: Coming-soon or launch pages with countdown timer, email capture, social links, and minimal branding.

item.name: 404 Layout
item.description: Error pages with clear messaging, helpful navigation links, and minimal visual noise.
